atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports numbness and tingling in the fingers and wrist.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports ongoing numbness and tingling in his fingers and wrist for several months.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain is gradually worsening over time.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports symptoms are most prominent at night.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports symptoms are relieved by shaking his hands.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports symptoms are associated with repetitive movements.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports increased weakness in his left hand.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports occasionally drops objects.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals decreased grip strength on the left hand.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals a positive Tinel's sign on the left wrist.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports feeling a 'zing' in his fingertips with wrist dorsiflexion.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's clinical presentation and exam findings are consistent with bilateral carpal tunnel syndrome.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes a wrist splint.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes ibuprofen 600 mg every six hours as needed.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: We will schedule a follow-up appointment in two weeks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right knee pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician recommends the patient explore options for modifying his landscaping work to reduce repetitive motions.
